name: code-quality
description: Code-quality + Git disciplines for Python/SQL/Git projects. 21 skills for code review (chunk dispatch, findings-as-RED-tests), Git hygiene (commit honesty, cross-repo state inspection, bypass audit), code patterns (lazy module getattr, subprocess SSH arg quoting). Plus 4 PreToolUse hooks for automatic Git enforcement and 1 read-only code-reviewer sub-agent. Language- and framework-agnostic.
